title: tragia dioica var. lobata
intro: Tragia dioica var. lobata is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spotted spurge or variegated spurge. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, derived from its roots, leaves, and stems. The health benefits of Tragia dioica var. lobata include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Tragia dioica var. lobata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
